reviews.title: Everything is PERFECT except...
reviews.text:
The staff. 

One of the staff at the reception counter was rather rude. The foreigner staff (i think he's a Bangladeshi) was nice too me but he seems to be having a hard time finding my reservation since i paid the room under Agoda. 

Later, the 'senior' staff, a chinese lady took over and from that moment on, I felt soooo humiliated.  The look on her face was like, "Got money meyh? Owh.. No wonder la, using Agoda got cheaper price one"

She even scolded the staff for not being able to find my reservation, when she also can't find one. And thinking that maybe I couldn't understand Mandarin, she spoke to someone on the phone (which i think maybe some superior) and badmouthing me. I may not be fluent in her language but I can understand 80% of her conversation.

Then after a 'few' confirmation on ID, finally I was able to check in. I've never ever stand in front of the hotel's check in counter that long in my life. She doesn't even bother to ask me to have a seat first while she sort the problem. Only the guy took initiative and offer me some tea.

It seems that they have a problem with online booking and making it looks like our fault since we booked online. I saw their normal hotel rate on the counter top and I must say that it was wayyyyy expensive compares to what I got from Agoda. I guess that explained why she was not satisfied with me.

Please note that I'm giving 1 star for everything, to make a pitch on this. In real, everything from value for money, location, cleanliness and facilities was great except for the one staff.

Please also be informed that the hotel will be taking a minimum of RM150 for room deposit when you check in.

reviews.title: Exceeded expectations
reviews.positives: It is unique and distinct  in many respects. Besides a promising and comfy hotel-like stay, it promotes natural healthy lifestyle. The great theme of Live Well, Eat Well and Look Well intrigues us to put up with it. We have had a great healthy meal in Mama Kim restaurant located just within easy reach downstairs. It’s a stay of great inspiration on wellness and beyond. The location is ideal with many different entities of convenience; eateries, bank and a hospital are just among the few to cater for every one’s needs. We highly recommend it for those who desire a different experience in staycation.
reviews.negatives: Though vehicle parking lot is limited, it shouldn’t be an issue since there are plenty of daily charging parking lots around it. Have to pay rm100 as deposit too.

reviews.title: The hotel was a pleasant surprise. We enjoyed our stay and would definitely choose to stay at the hotel again.
reviews.positives:
We chose this hotel because it was close to our relatives’ houses. Nothing looks special on the outside but once you cross the threshold into the hotel, you’re greeted by the aroma of lemongrass essence & you’re transported into a totally different ambiance - evoking a warm, cozy & relaxed atmosphere. 

We arrived super early so could not check-in but we were welcomed into the waiting area & served hot lemongrass tea. Since we couldn’t check-in yet, we stowed our luggage at the hotel while we ate lunch at a nearby eatery serving various affordable local food. Another plus- the hotel is within walking distance to different convenience stores, restaurants & banks. 

We booked the family & deluxe queen room & were greatly impressed by the cleanliness, design & layout. The family room was spacious enough to accommodate some relatives who came to check out the room & who were also impressed by its size, design & layout.

The staff was courteous, friendly & helpful. During our stay we dealt mostly with Simon, who was especially friendly, helpful & accommodating. Thank you, Simon!
reviews.negatives:
In the family room we would prefer an electric kettle for hot water as opposed to getting it from the general station outside the room.

The frosted glass for the bathroom is aesthetically pleasing but in the family room, perhaps the curtain that covers the bathtub, can be drawn all the way to cover the frosted glass since not all occupants of a family room are couples, partners or family members.

I would say , I love the place in the past but not now

reviews.title: Lovely spa hotel
reviews.positives:
We stayed at for one night over the weekend with my wheelchair-bound mum and siblings, and had a lovely, restful experience overall.

From the start, the hotel was very responsive and accommodating — they ensured we had a wheelchair-friendly room and helped with an early check-in. The staff were polite, attentive, and genuinely helpful throughout our stay. The property itself feels like a calm oasis in the city, with the soothing scent of lemongrass essential oil greeting you the moment you arrive.

The amenities are thoughtful, from essential-oil infused toiletries to the refreshing lemongrass drink and hot water available just outside the room. The spa and massage services were excellent — definitely worth trying — and the in-house restaurant, Mama Kim, served delicious, wholesome food with impeccable service.

Overall, a wonderfully relaxing stay — perfect for a short city retreat with family, especially for those who appreciate good service, aromatherapy, and a serene atmosphere.
reviews.negatives: If I had to nitpick, the road noise at night and thin walls meant you can occasionally hear traffic or neighbours chatting. That said, the beds and pillows were so comfortable that I slept soundly anyway.

reviews.positives:
The smell of lemongrass welcomed us to the guest house. It is very comforting and relaxing. I am glad that i have chosen a double bed room even though i am a single travel. The space is nice for me and my luggage. The shampoo and conditioner and bath gel are all lemongrass and make me feel like I am in a resort after I finish my bath. 

The common hot/warm/cool water dispenser is just outside my room. Only thing is that the tea bags always run out. I supposed it is becos some of the guests have pack them away for themselves. Thus hard for the staffs to refill them. 

Their sample coconut cookies are excellent, and I bought a few boxes as souvenirs for my family and colleagues. 

The food at the connecting restaurant is also marvellous with good mix of vegetarian and normal food. I could have my meals there every day if I have any breaks from the meetings. 

Will definitely choose this homestay if I am back for another business trip!

Hope to be here again, soon!

reviews.text:
+ Very clean & place filled with  lemon grass aroma which is refreshing 
+ Helpful staff 
+ Affordable Spa. Love the complimentary feet wax. 
+ Near restaurants & eateries 
Even though the room is small, ironing board, complimentary tea, hair dryer & toiletries are all provided. Absolutely loved the body soap, shampoo & conditioner provided. The wash basin is aesthetically pleasing to the eye. Overall it’s a good night stay & very rejuvenating.

reviews.title: Second visit within one month.
reviews.text:
Sojourn beckoned me again with good service from the staff. The rooms are clean and the free tea on each floor is of high quality. A relaxing place before and after a busy day. 

Pros: clean, service is pleasent, thank you for the free breakfast coupons, WiFi is great.
Cons: rooms at the back of hotel may be noisy as there's many restaurants that open till late,  parking on the main road if there's no reserved parking available, checkout time is a bit too early although the staff were kind enough to extend it after request.

In summary i would consider staying here a third time if they keep up the quality

reviews.title: An oasis with good people a stone's throw from Hospital Ampang
reviews.text:
I had a meeting at Hospital Ampang and booked Sojourn Guest House becaused its less than 1km away.
I came for business, but had a really restful stay. The free green tea and rest area are great.
The room is spacious for the price with nice and interesting features. It is also well equipped with iron/ironing board, hair dryer etc which in other hotels would be on special request especially at this price range.

The staff were helpful and polite. I was blown away with the complimentary breakfast set voucher which was given to me on check-in. The coffee at the adjoining restaurant is especially mentionable.
Parking is along the main street, if you are lucky you can get the reserved parking right in front of the lobby.

All in all, I would recommend this hotel as it is very nearby Hospital Ampang and also provides lots of addons which make for a pleasent restful stay.

Cons:

reviews.title: Wow! It is not just a boutique hotel
reviews.text:
We checked in at around 1am, main door was locked. Press the doorbell seems not functioning well.
Wave to the receptionists, one of the smart look guys quickly opened the door for us with friendly smile & warm regards. He explained clearly about the hotel rules, e.g.: no durian, smoking, pets… and the most important thing is the parking fee which start at 9am. (There is lot of empty parking spaces at night, but day time could be difficult as Pandan Indah is a major township in Ampang)
I fell pleasant and relaxing as lemongrass smell penetrates the whole lobby and hallways of hotel.
The rooms were nicely decorated & spacious, user friendly, detail oriented. The amenities are good, shampoo & conditional, bath gel provided and comes hairdryer which is out of my expectation.
The breakfast is delicious and unique, staff is friendly.
The hotel brings out theme of slow down, successfully remind me to slow down my steps in this busy city.
“Take time to do what makes your soul happy"

reviews.title: Stopover for work matters
reviews.text: A sweet experience staying at a very beautiful hotel, very fragrant, very pleasant. Arrival was greeted with a refreshing fragrance from the lobby to the room. A feeling that cannot be expressed in words when stepping into the room, a plate of cookies and fruit with a welcome card was already available on the side table. I felt like I was on a honeymoon hahahahaha. The male staff was very friendly and very helpful. Always smiling. Imagine when you are taking a shower, the shower emits a very fragrant and fresh scent of herbal leaves. Words cannot express it. Feel the experience yourself and you will understand what I am saying, not just talk. This hotel seemed to take me to another world. Honestly, I can't forget it and I really hope to go back there again. Thank you sojourn for the great and amazing service. Oh yes, thank you for the souvenir given when I checked out. I really like it. ❤️🌸

reviews.title: Amazing accommodation experience
reviews.text:
The accommodation environment is excellent, and it is a hotel with a very high cost-performance ratio. This is not a guest house but rather like a hotel. It is comfortable and has a Zen feel. The room has all the necessary equipment, and the design is very thoughtful and convenient for guests. They also thoughtfully provided welcome fruits. There are many dining options nearby, and there is also a shopping mall close by. Very convenient.

The staff are polite and friendly. I needed to call for a car to the airport at 5 AM, and when I asked them the night before, they could help me make the reservation. It alleviated my anxiety about transportation difficulties. I felt very secure during my stay. The surrounding environment at night is also not noisy, allowing for a quiet sleep.

Next time I come, I will still choose to stay at the same hotel. Highly recommended! It was an amazing stay experience.
